game.short_text: Explore the Holy Cathedral and uncover its Demonic Secrets!
game.title: Reflections of the Past

details.title: Reflections of the Past
details.description:
After a long and difficult adventure, you finally reach your destination: The Holy Cathedral of Purity.
In "Reflections of the Past" you will shift into the reflections to a parallel world that was seemingly left untouched by time. Though something seems to not be right...Explore the holy cathedral and uncover its demonic secrets!Reflections of the Past is a project made for Epic MegaJam 2022.Game developers:Pavel TanonovPatrick SpackAlexander Hamparsomian

game.short_text: Explore light dispersion in a puzzle game
game.title: Split Light

details.title: Split Light
details.description:
Solo-developed puzzle game for 2022 Epic MegaJam.
The game is built around NVIDIA Ray-Traced Caustic Effects.

The world is split into two identical parts, direct the light beam through it and reach the color sensors.
Use different lenses, rotate them, and change their type and color in runtime.GPU that supports NVIDIA RTX is mandatory.
The game is running on experimental NVIDIA tech, so there is a small probability of having bugs connected to it.
If color sensors stop detecting color input, reopen the game (progress saves).
There is one reported case when full-windowed mode on the 2160p screen is not working correctly in regards to level completion validation (color sensors are not detecting clolor correctly). If it is the case for you, try to force windowed mode (preferably 1080p)

game.short_text: You'll find yourself in complex story, and gradually piece together the dark secrets of what is happening.
game.title: Beneath Fateful Night

details.title: Beneath Fateful Night
details.description:
2022 Epic MegaJam

Developed for a 7 days Game Jam using Free Marketplace Assets using Unreal Engine 5.

In this short horror game, you'll find yourself in a house where dreams and droplets collide. As you explore the eerie premises, you'll gradually piece together the dark secrets of what happened here. With each step, the dread builds, until you're faced with a horrifying truth that will leave you reeling.

details.title: Samurai of the Black Sun
details.description:
Big evil eclipse in the sky makes evil stuff happen on the ground. Necromancers, the undead, active volcanoes and more.
There's hidden scalability options by pressing CTRL+SHIFT 5, 6, 7, 8  in the gameplay bit that change the resolution scale. Kind of a last minute addition, so no proper menu for them. 
Clicking on the skulls on the main menu map let you choose difficulty. It goes from really easy to regular (default and what you're meant to pick) to very hard.Just unzip it and launch the exe. There's a little readme with some extra notes for changing scalability options and stuff. Didn't have time to make proper menus for that.

game.short_text: Adventure with a parallel realms mechanics
game.title: Papenture

details.title: Papenture
details.description:
This is what happens when artists didn't agree on visual style. Parallel universes! Switch between two realms in order to explore each of them. Pass items through the portal to see them transform and to help character on the other side.

Controls 

WASD — move 
LMB — attack/accelerate (when empty handed) 
E — pick up an item/use an item (if it's already picked up)
Q — throw the item away
Z — switch between characters (it's not working everywhere) 
Alt+f4 — quit the game :^)

The game was created for Unreal  MegaJam 2022. The theme was «As Above So Below» and the limitation we've decided to apply is «Use it or Lose it» the main point of which is to use only one texture map at once.

About Limitation
We put all of our sprites on one list and created a material that scales to specific square on UV. Prepared models for each of every possible sprite. Background was cut into few pieces in order to fit the rest of the texture.


Follow us on twitter! 
https://twitter.com/Zander__Games

game.short_text: the cycle of fish - difficulty is your choice
game.title: The Fish King

details.title: The Fish King
details.description:
StoryYou are a fish! Your goal: get food to survive!
Unfortunately this is easier said than done! The King of the aquarium has the full power over the food distribution, and he wants you to work for him for which he will reward you with food!
Explore the 3 caves of the aquarium and bring shiny diamonds to the King - but beware, these challenges are exhausting for little fish like you.
Luckily, other fish of the aquarium are catching onto you and since you are their connection to the king and food, they are eager to work for you and are waiting until you give them their cut!
Will you be a fair middle fish between king and the villagers? Or do you want to be on the throne yourself without caring for the others.DevelopmentThis game was made by twitch.tv/peekstone (Vods Available)  in 4 days for the Epic Mega Jam 2022ControlsThe game was made for the controller, but it can be played with Keyboard as well.ControllerKBInteract(A)(SPACE)Move(Left Stick)(WASD)Switch Path(Y)(L.SHIFT)Eat Snack(X)(CTRL)Dialog Choice(Left Stick)(WASD)

In this game, you are a cook in a Fast Food Restaurant, and you make pizzas. 
Download, extract game files from ZIP archive or from the RAR archive, and just start the game from the .exe file.

game.short_text: Grow your own tree in this relaxing rhythmic mini game. Made for Epic Mega Jam 2022
game.title: The Tree Rhythmers

details.title: The Tree Rhythmers
details.description:
A relaxing game created as a submission to Epic MegaJam 2022.
The Tree Growth powered with Nature Growth Components Plugin
Game Description:
Hit the notes on both Staffs to keep the tree growing.  
The notes in the top staff will feed the Crown of the tree, while the ones in the bottom staff feed the Roots of the tree.
The game features 4 tunes (shoutout to weloveindies.com ) that launch randomly each time you restart the game (R button).
The growing tree and dynamic weather are there to soothe player and distract from the daily routines.  
There is a hard mode, which is quite challenging for the single player, but divide the responsibility with a friend and you get pretty fun collaborative (or competitive if you'll look at the scoring) rhythm game.
Thanks for playing! I hope you'll enjoy!

Controls:
Main menu: 
Space bar - to start a simple  gameR - to restart the gameEsc - to exit the game

Hit the notes in the top staff: 
Keyboard: Up / W / Enter Gamepad: D-pad Up /  Face Button Top 
Hit the notes in the bottom staff: 
Keyboard: Down/S/Gamepad: D-pad Down/ Face Button Bottom

Why is it important to grow a tree one may ask? Well look outside - there are not that many trees out there. 
So whether you like the game or you don't I suggest you go and and plant a real tree :) It will feel good, trust me on this one!
